message.confirm.autoRebuildIndex:
Old index data has been cleared. Do you want to start a full index rebuild now based on the new model? (This may consume significant API resources and time)
You can choose 'Cancel' to rebuild it manually later in the settings panel.
message.confirm.changeEmbeddingModel: Changing the embedding service will clear the old index and immediately rebuild it with the new service. Continue?
message.error.ragIndexDimensionMismatch: The current vector index is incompatible with the embedding model dimension. Please rebuild the index and search again.
message.error.ragNotConfigured: RAG is not fully configured. Please configure the embedding model first.

sync.error.connectionFailed: Unable to reach the remote sync provider.
sync.error.notConfigured: Complete the sync provider configuration before running sync.
sync.error.remoteLocked: Another device is syncing this workspace. Try again shortly.
sync.error.unknown: Sync failed due to an unknown error.
sync.notice.pendingRecovered: Recovered from an interrupted sync session.
text.aiAssistant: Intelligently predict and generate subsequent text based on your input
text.aiAutoContinue: Automatically predict the next continuation after accepting a suggestion
text.aiRAG: Build vector index from notes for semantic search and context enhancement
text.AISystemPrompt: 系统提示词将根据写作风格和写作场景自动生成
text.aiWritingMode.aggressive: Lowest delay and cooldown. Provides highly frequent and continuous predictions
text.aiWritingMode.focus: Longest delay and cooldown. Keeps visual distractions to an absolute minimum
text.aiWritingMode.standard: Recommended. Predicts and provides suggestions when you pause naturally
text.aiWritingScenario: Keeps smart continuation aligned with the target use case
text.aiWritingStyle: Controls the expression and wording preference of smart continuation
text.autoCloseBrackets: Automatically insert closing brackets and quotes
text.autoIndent: Automatically maintain indentation level on new lines
text.codeFolding: Allow folding code blocks and headings
text.importExportSettings: 导入或导出当前应用的所有配置数据
text.inputAllFields: Please fill in all fields (including model)
text.logAutoClear: Automatically permanently delete log files older than the selected retention period.
text.logLevelDesc: Only logs at or above the selected level will be recorded.
text.maxHistoryVersions: Maximum number of history versions to keep per note (0 to disable).
text.noteStorageLocation: 当前用户数据保存路径：
text.previewAllowHtml: Allow raw HTML tags in Markdown preview. Turn this off if you prefer strict Markdown-only rendering.
text.previewAllowInlineSvg: Allow inline SVG markup used by badges, icons, and embedded vector graphics in preview.
text.previewRemoteImages.all: Allow all remote images. Warning: This may pose privacy risks and is not recommended.
text.previewRemoteImages.blocked: Block all remote images in preview for maximum security.
text.previewRemoteImages.trusted: Only allow remote images from the trusted hosts list below.
text.previewTrustedSourcesHint: 出于安全考虑，在预览中仅会加载 HTTPS 协议的远程图片资源
text.ragAdvanced: Used to tune knowledge-base retrieval and chunking strategy. Defaults usually work best.
text.ragAutoRebuildProgress: Embedding model changed. Rebuilding the index automatically ({current}/{total}, {progress}%).
text.ragChatModel: AI service used for knowledge-base question answering; disable it to only return retrieval results.
text.ragEmbeddingModel: AI service for generating text embeddings
text.remotePath: The cloud folder path for storing notes, e.g., /SnaptiumSync
text.selectAIAssistantSourceName: 智能写作所使用的AI服务
text.showStatusBar: Display status bar with word count, line count, and cursor position
text.snapshotInterval: 自动生成笔记版本快照的时间间隔
text.startupDefaultView: Choose whether to open the workbench or workspace on application launch.
text.syncAutoOnSave: Trigger a sync after a note has been saved locally.
text.syncInterval: Choose how often automatic background sync runs.
text.syncRemoteData: Sync the local Database folder to WebDAV or S3-compatible object storage.
text.syncTarget: Choose the remote storage provider used for synchronization.
text.trashAutoClear: Automatically permanently delete notes from trash after a specified duration.
text.UIDisplayLanguage: 切换软件界面显示语言
text.webdavPassword: Your WebDAV account password or app password
text.webdavUrl: The WebDAV server URL, usually starting with https://
text.wordWrap: Wrap text to fit editor width
text.ragAutoIndex: Automatically index all notes on app startup
text.ragIndexOnSave: Automatically update index when notes are saved
text.ragIndexStatus: View current index status and rebuild index
text.ragTopK: Number of most relevant chunks to return (1-20)
toolbar.heading: Heading
trash.name: Note Name/Notebook Name

workbench.config.title: Visible Modules
workbench.empty.noActivity: Your recent activity will appear here once you start working.
workbench.empty.noFavorites: Star a note from recent or related recommendations to pin it here.
workbench.empty.noNotesBody: Create your first note to turn the workbench into a real operating surface.
workbench.empty.noQuestions: Semantic questions will show up here after you search with RAG enabled.
workbench.empty.noRecentNotes: Open or edit a note to see it here.
workbench.empty.noRelatedNotes: Related note recommendations will appear after you build more context.
workbench.featured.fallback: Return to the latest note and keep the draft moving.
workbench.module.recentNotesTitle: Pick up where you left off
workbench.related.fallback: Showing recent notes while RAG recommendations are unavailable
workbench.related.semantic: Built from recent content and semantic recall
workbench.startup.defaultToWorkbenchHint: Uncheck to start in Workspace instead.
workbench.subtitle: Bring recent notes, writing momentum, activity, Q&A, and semantic recommendations into one operational home screen.
workbench.title: Start from the work that matters now.
e2ee.securityDescription: All synced data is encrypted locally before upload and decrypted only on your device.
e2ee.securityStatusUnconfiguredDesc: Master password not set. Setting it enables E2EE for sync and local Access Control.
e2ee.masterPasswordDesc: Manage your master password, the core credential for data protection.
e2ee.masterPasswordRequired: Setting a Master Password is required to enable End-to-End Encryption (E2EE). It encrypts your synced notes to ensure data privacy and also serves as the credential for 'Access Control' to protect your local workspace.
e2ee.unlockRecoveryLink: Forgot your Master Password? Use Recovery Key
e2ee.locked: Workspace is locked. Enter your Master Password to sync.
e2ee.unlockVerificationDescription: Please verify with your Master Password to unlock sync.
e2ee.unavailable: Security module is unavailable in this runtime.
e2ee.recoveryKey.title: Recovery Key
e2ee.recoveryKey.displayLabel: Please save this recovery key immediately
e2ee.recoveryKey.description: Used to restore access if you forget your password. Keep it safe.
e2ee.recoveryKey.exported: Recovery Key exported to text file
e2ee.recoveryKey.regenerateVerifyDesc: Regenerating the recovery key requires verifying your Master Password. The old key will become invalid.
e2ee.resetPasswordDescription: If you forgot your Master Password, use your Recovery Key to reset it and restore access to your data.
e2ee.error.dekNotUnlocked: Please unlock with your Master Password before syncing
e2ee.error.setupFailed: Failed to set up Master Password
e2ee.error.masterPasswordRequired: Cloud Sync requires a Master Password. Please set it first in Security settings.
e2ee.accessControl.title: Access Control
e2ee.accessControl.unavailable: Access Control is unavailable in this runtime.
e2ee.accessControl.requireMasterPassword: Set up a Master Password first, then enable Access Control.
e2ee.accessControl.disabledDescription: Access Control is disabled. Enable it to require your Master Password after lock events.
e2ee.accessControl.enabledDescription: Access Control is enabled and currently verified.
e2ee.accessControl.lockedDescription: Access Control is enabled and currently locked.
e2ee.accessControl.lockOnStartupDesc: Always require master password when application starts
e2ee.accessControl.autoLockTimeoutDesc: The app will automatically lock after being inactive for the specified time
e2ee.accessControl.unlockDescription: Enter your Master Password to verify access.
